snippets.description: BulkAnalyzeConversations analyzes multiple conversations in a single request.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights BulkAnalyzeConversations Sample

snippets.description: BulkDeleteConversations deletes multiple conversations in a single request.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights BulkDeleteConversations Sample

snippets.description: BulkDownloadFeedbackLabels download feedback labels in bulk.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights BulkDownloadFeedbackLabels Sample

snippets.description: BulkUploadFeedbackLabels upload feedback labels in bulk.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights BulkUploadFeedbackLabels Sample

snippets.description: CalculateIssueModelStats gets an issue model's statistics.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights CalculateIssueModelStats Sample

snippets.description: CancelOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights CancelOperation Sample

snippets.description:
CreateAnalysis creates an analysis. The long running operation is done when the analysis
has completed.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights CreateAnalysis Sample

snippets.description:
CreateConversation creates a conversation.
Note that this method does not support audio transcription or redaction.
Use `conversations.upload` instead.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights CreateConversation Sample

snippets.description:
DeployIssueModel deploys an issue model. Returns an error if a model is already deployed.
An issue model can only be used in analysis after it has been deployed.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights DeployIssueModel Sample

snippets.description: ExportInsightsData export insights data to a destination defined in the request body.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ExportInsightsData Sample

snippets.description: ExportIssueModel exports an issue model to the provided destination.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ExportIssueModel Sample

snippets.description: GetEncryptionSpec gets location-level encryption key specification.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights GetEncryptionSpec Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: ImportIssueModel imports an issue model from a Cloud Storage bucket.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ImportIssueModel Sample

snippets.description:
IngestConversations imports conversations and processes them according to the user's
configuration.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights IngestConversations Sample

snippets.description:
InitializeEncryptionSpec initializes a location-level encryption key specification. An error will
result if the location has resources already created before the
initialization. After the encryption specification is initialized at a
location, it is immutable and all newly created resources under the
location will be encrypted with the existing specification.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights InitializeEncryptionSpec Sample

snippets.description: ListAllFeedbackLabels list all feedback labels by project number.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ListAllFeedbackLabels Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ListOperations Sample

snippets.description: ListQaScorecardRevisions lists all revisions under the parent QaScorecard.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights ListQaScorecardRevisions Sample

snippets.description: TuneQaScorecardRevision fine tune one or more QaModels.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights TuneQaScorecardRevision Sample

snippets.description:
UndeployIssueModel undeploys an issue model.
An issue model can not be used in analysis after it has been undeployed.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights UndeployIssueModel Sample

snippets.description:
UploadConversation create a long-running conversation upload operation. This method differs
from `CreateConversation` by allowing audio transcription and optional DLP
redaction.
snippets.title: contactcenterinsights UploadConversation Sample
